## Checklist

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`php artisan test --compact`)
- [ ] New functionality has accompanying tests
- [ ] Code coverage has not decreased
- [ ] Code formatting passes (`vendor/bin/pint --test`)
- [ ] All new user-facing strings use `__()`
- [ ] New and modified methods have PHPDoc comments
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section updated with attribution
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable
